Example Co

Mavenn Platform

Mavenn transforms how teams capture and retrieve knowledge. Built on a graph-aware retrieval engine, it connects ideas across documents, conversations, and codebases.

Key Features

  • Automatic knowledge extraction from meetings, docs, and chat
  • Semantic search with context-aware ranking
  • Wikilink graph for navigating relationships between concepts
  • Decay and reinforcement to keep knowledge fresh

Integrations

Mavenn connects to Slack, Notion, GitHub, and Google Workspace out of the box. A plugin SDK lets you build custom connectors for internal tools.

Pricing

Free for teams up to 5. Pro starts at $12/user/month with unlimited knowledge entries and priority support.
